title: Pet Gravestone
description: When your tamed mob dies it will leave a gravestone behind and you can resurrect it.
body:
**Forge, Neoforge and Fabric**


 

When your tamed mob dies it will leave a gravestone behind and you can resurrect it.

 

To revive your lost pet from the gravestone you have to click on it with an item.

 

There are 3 item tags created for this:

-Low quality revive items (5% chance to revive the pet, default item: bone)

-normal quality revive items (20% chance to revive the pet, default item: emerald)

-high quality revive items (100% chance to revive the pet, default item: diamond)

 

So you can change these to whatever you want.

You can find them in data/pet_gravestone/tags/item/

 

You can mine it from ground after the pet has been revived.

(While its still not revived it will show a particle effect around the gravestone)

 

Thanks for downloading the mod if you find any bugs send me a message
